credentialRequirements.name: VERCEL_TOKEN
credentialRequirements.description: Vercel personal access token for CLI deployment

credentialRequirements.name: VERCEL_ORG_ID
credentialRequirements.description: Vercel organization ID for target project

credentialRequirements.name: OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET
credentialRequirements.description: OIDC provider client secret for auth

credentialRequirements.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
credentialRequirements.description: Stripe secret key for payment processing

approvalGate.blockedReason: Live Vercel deployment requires user-supplied VERCEL_TOKEN, VERCEL_ORG_ID, VERCEL_PROJECT_ID, and DATABASE_URL. No credentials supplied in proof pass.
requiredUserActions: Supply VERCEL_TOKEN via environment variable (not committed to source)
Supply VERCEL_ORG_ID and VERCEL_PROJECT_ID from Vercel dashboard

providerAdapters.preflightCheck: Verify deploy/vercel.json exists and is valid JSON
Verify deploy/deployment_readiness.json declares database and auth readiness

secretPolicyChecks.description: No .env files with real credential values committed to source
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No committed .env files with real credential values detected for web_saas_app

secretPolicyChecks.description: Environment variable manifest (.env.example or app.config.json) is present
All required credentials declare mustNotBeCommitted=true for secrets
secretPolicyChecks.detail: mustNotBeCommitted=true is declared for all secret-class credentials in the credential manifest.

secretPolicyChecks.description: No hardcoded secret patterns (API keys, JWT tokens, AWS keys) found in source files
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No hardcoded secret patterns detected in web_saas_app source files

caveat: This manifest declares credential requirements for approved credentialed deployment. No credentials are stored, validated, or used in this proof pass. Live deployment is blocked by default and requires explicit user approval and user-supplied credentials.
